title: Post-beta launch
description: Complete these when moving from beta testers to public launch. Track progress here and in npm run verify:launch.

items.label: Google / YouTube OAuth published to production
items.detail: Submit Google OAuth app for verification; exit Testing mode so any Google user can connect YouTube (not just test users).

items.label: TikTok Login Kit approved and live
items.detail: Use production Client Key/Secret on Vercel; register redirect on canonical domain.

items.label: Meta / Instagram Login approved
items.detail: Finish business verification and app review; set INSTAGRAM_CLIENT_ID/SECRET on Vercel.

items.label: All OAuth redirect URIs use canonical domain
items.detail: Update Google, Twitch, TikTok, Meta, and Supabase auth URLs to playeroneiq.com (or www) — remove vercel.app-only URLs when ready.

items.label: Migration 064 applied (OAuth token column lockdown)
items.detail: Run supabase/migrations/064_protect_oauth_metadata_column.sql in production Supabase.

items.label: API_KEY_PEPPER set in Vercel
items.detail: Required if Agency Pro API keys are offered to customers.

items.label: Supabase leaked-password protection enabled
items.detail: Authentication → Providers → enable HaveIBeenPwned check.

items.label: 2FA enabled on admin accounts
items.detail: Vercel, Supabase, Google Cloud, Stripe, TikTok, and Meta developer accounts.

items.label: Beta secrets rotated if shared widely
items.detail: CRON_SECRET, PLATFORM_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET, and any test API keys.

items.label: Custom domain fully live (apex + www)
items.detail: playeroneiq.com A record points to Vercel; www CNAME configured; NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL matches canonical URL.

items.label: Stripe live mode + production webhook
items.detail: Live keys on Vercel; webhook at /api/billing/webhook on canonical domain.

items.label: Resend on custom sending domain
items.detail: INVITE_EMAIL_FROM uses your domain, not onboarding@resend.dev.

items.label: Error monitoring and uptime alerts configured
items.detail: e.g. Sentry or Vercel monitoring; alert on /api/health failures.

items.label: Supabase backup / PITR plan confirmed
items.detail: Enable point-in-time recovery on Pro if customer data volume warrants it.

items.label: Privacy Policy and Terms expanded for production
items.detail: Cover OAuth data, retention, subprocessors, and contact for data requests.

items.label: Beta messaging removed from marketing site
items.detail: Update landing page copy and pricing CTAs for general availability.

items.label: Data deletion / disconnect process documented
items.detail: Users can disconnect platforms and request workspace deletion.

items.label: Self-serve signup and onboarding tested end-to-end
items.detail: Agency, creator, and sponsor flows without manual invites.

items.label: Support channel and SLA defined for paid tiers
items.detail: Public support email; response expectations documented.

items.label: Billing tiers and trial policy communicated
items.detail: Free vs paid plans clear on site and in-app.

items.label: npm run verify:launch passes on production URL
items.detail: Run against https://www.playeroneiq.com (or canonical domain) before GA.
